calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-02-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: his cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Judge Ollie Marie Victoire, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, CSR: Cristina Paxton.
Petitioner: Marina Titenko, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: MARINA BALCHUNAS.
Decree signed in open court.
